title: Make a Correction - Student Version
content:
Make a Correction to a Submitted Form - Student Version
Morgan State University - Office of the Registrar

This guide is for STUDENTS. It explains how to make a correction to a form you previously submitted through the Service Request system.

---

STEP 1: ACCESS SERVICE REQUESTS
From Websis Student Self-Service, click "Service Request".

---

STEP 2: ENTER YOUR EMAIL
Enter your MSU email address and press continue. You will be logged into Smartsheet.

---

STEP 3: SIGN IN AND LAUNCH DASHBOARD
Sign in with your Morgan credentials and launch the dashboard: Office of Registrar - Student Dashboard.

---

STEP 4: LOCATE YOUR SUBMISSION
Find the request type you previously submitted and click on it to view the details.

---

STEP 5A: IF THE CURRENT APPROVER IS NOT THE FINAL APPROVER
You can make corrections or cancel the request. The options are:
- "I need to make a correction"
- "Please cancel request"

Check the appropriate option, click SAVE, and refresh the page.

---

STEP 5B: IF THE CURRENT APPROVER IS "STUDENT"
This means the request has been returned to you. You will have received an email notification. The reason for the return is listed under COMMENTS/ACTION ITEMS. Review the reason and make the necessary corrections in the details field.

---

STEP 6: RESUBMIT
Click "I have made all necessary corrections" and save to resubmit the form. The request will re-enter the approval workflow.

For the full official guide with screenshots, view: [Student Correction Guide](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1gjyk5iVkQ5qkjY1RkPPrTvgll3mh8U6T/view)
